title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 15 - 2018: Rode 3 Hrs

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on the morning of June 15, 2018 from his Boulder home, recapping his first road bike ride the previous day up a steep dirt road near James Canyon and Sunshine Canyon. He talks about fixing his bike axle, struggling with hills at 196 lbs on a road bike, Garmin computer sync issues, needing to buy a water bottle, and his plans to ride again that day before a contact prescription appointment.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: committed to riding every day now after his first ride
finds it very hard at his weight but pushed through and made it
frustrated by repeated cable failures, plans to call Garmin support
